name: Banana Loaf (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 8 apricots, cut into very small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare ingredients: grate orange rind and set aside; mash bananas; dice the apricots and chop the nutmeats.
2. In a bowl, blend olive oil, sugar, and grated orange rind until creamy.
3. Beat in egg substitute and banana pulp.
4. With mixer on slow speed, add baking powder, wheat germ, and flour; increase speed to medium and beat batter until smooth.
5. Fold in apricots and pecan meats.
6. Spray a microwave-safe ring mold with canola oil spray. Pour batter into the mold.
7. Microwave on high for 6 minutes (or longer if needed).
8. Insert a toothpick into the thickest part; it should come out clean.
9. Turn out onto a plate and let cool before slicing.
